transcript: [to the tune of "The Beautiful People"] ...I'm gonna eat 'ya / The beautiful pigeon, the beautiful pigeon / The beautiful pigeon, the beautiful pigeon!
[delayed] Yeah, this is Dr. Slap. [exhales] And I'm about to send shockwaves with some electric slap bass. Uh... at the... uh... Bass Get Down Junction. Nineteen ninety-ni-- [loops, pitch lowers]
